docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,225.95 FILED BY BACLIG, BELLAROSE AS TO DEFENDANT MACATO, THERESITA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 20.00 SERVED JUN-03-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MACATO, THERESITA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY BACLIG, BELLAROSE MACATO, THERESITA
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF BELLAROSE BACLIG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THERESITA MACATO IS PRESENT. AFTER HEARING TESTIMONY IT WAS DETERMINED BY JPT BRUCE LUBARSKY THAT THIS CLAIM IS NOT PROPER AND IS SUBJECT TO RES JUDICATA (CSM-17-856866). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE LUBARSKY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
